text: Found a $14.2k budget overlap on Acme Corp, the 6/12 reallocation hit Meta but never pulled back in DV360. I can pause DV360 now or roll the overspend into July. What do you prefer?
Pause the DV360 lines, I'd rather be conservative with client budget.
Got it, I'll pause the DV360 line items now and reconcile against the IO. Will confirm when it's done.
